'''Magenge''' was a [[Color/Legends|light green]], sweet-tasting [[Fungus/Legends|fungus]] that was the basis of the [[Verpine/Legends|Verpine]] diet. The Verpine cultivated magenge on grow walls in [[Agrifactory|agrifactories]] on their [[Asteroid/Legends|asteroid]] colonies in the [[Roche asteroid field]].<ref name="SFS" />

==Appearances==
*''[[Strike Force: Shantipole]]'' {{Reprint|Strike Force: Shantipole}} {{1st}}
